issues.detail: The skill references a Claude-specific file path (.claude/product-marketing-context.md), limiting its applicability to Claude agents.

scenarios.name: Audit a 12-field B2B demo request form with 4% completion
scenarios.rationale: Treatment applied the field-count cost rule (7+ fields = 25-50% drop), recommended cutting to 5 core fields with enrichment post-submit, 2-step progressive form, action+benefit CTA copy, and a prioritized Issue/Impact/Fix/Priority audit table per the SKILL output format; baseline gave generic 'reduce fields, add trust signals' advice without structure.

scenarios.name: Lead capture form for a gated DevOps report
scenarios.rationale: Treatment recommended minimum-viable single-email capture with post-download enrichment, action+benefit CTA, social proof near form, and 3-5x lift projection following the Lead Capture pattern in the SKILL; baseline kept 4 fields and added vague trust copy.
